title: Tarasinese
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Tarasinese''' was the language of the [[Tarasin]] [[Species/Legends|species]] native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Cularin/Legends|Cularin]]. Tarasins had a rich oral tradition in Tarasinese. Most Tarasins were fluent in both Tarasinese and [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]], being literate in both languages.<ref name="u">''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]''</ref>

Tarasin hunters were also fluent in [[Tarasin Skintone Language|Tarasin skintone language]], a silent form of communication that was done by changing the color of their scales.<ref name="u" />

{{Language-stub}}

==Tarasinese words==
*'''Hiilau''' - an act of sacrifice<ref name="Sacrifices">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/livingforce/swlf20040812|text=Sacrifices}}</ref>
*[[Kampo]] - head-fan
*[[Sa'tosin]] - fore-arm quills
